artists.name: VØID ARCHITECT
artists.gearBrings:
Elektron Octatrack MK2
Moog Subsequent 37
Roland TR-8S
Korg Volca FM x2
Focusrite Scarlett 18i8
Ableton Push 3 (standalone)
MacBook Pro 14" (backup)
Sennheiser E935 (vocals)
Boom stand x2
Patch cables / power strip (personal)
artists.venueNeeds:
Power strip x2 (16A)
DI box x4
XLR snake to FOH (8 lines min)
Monitor wedge x2
Spot lighting on rig
Table riser if available
artists.routing:
CH5 L: Octatrack main L
CH5 R: Octatrack main R
CH6 L: Moog Subsequent 37 L
CH6 R: Moog Subsequent 37 R
CH7: TR-8S kick
CH8: TR-8S hats / perc
CH9: Volca FM 1
CH10: Volca FM 2
CH11: Vocals (Sennheiser E935)
CH12 L: Laptop backup L
CH12 R: Laptop backup R
artists.notes: Needs 30 min changeover before set. No flash photography during performance — strictly enforced.

artists.name: CASSETTE WRAITH
artists.gearBrings:
Pioneer CDJ-3000 x2
Pioneer DJM-V10
Shure SE846 IEMs
Laptop (Rekordbox)
USB drives x3
artists.venueNeeds:
DI box x2
Ethernet cable to booth
USB hub at booth
Monitor wedge
artists.routing:
CH3 L: DJM-V10 master L
CH3 R: DJM-V10 master R
artists.notes: Prefers Ethernet over Wi-Fi for streaming backup. Booth monitor level — medium, no subs.

artists.name: LYRA-7
artists.gearBrings:
Eurorack modular (104hp 6U — road case)
Make Noise 0-Coast
Korg Minilogue XD
Strymon BigSky reverb
ERM Multiclock
Focusrite Scarlett 4i4
Custom MIDI controller (USB powered)
Laptop (VCV Rack backup)
artists.venueNeeds:
Power strip x2 (surge protected — critical)
DI box x4
Monitor wedge x2 or side-fill
Table 160×60cm minimum — no cloth, hard surface
XLR snake 4 lines to FOH
Liaise with lighting re: fog cue at 00:45
artists.routing:
CH5 L: Modular stereo out L
CH5 R: Modular stereo out R
CH6: 0-Coast mono
CH7 L: Minilogue XD L
CH7 R: Minilogue XD R
CH8: Click / trigger (monitor only, no FOH)
artists.notes: Modular rig requires minimum 30 min setup. Do not rush changeover from VØID ARCHITECT — coordinate with stage manager. Power must be on before artist arrives.

artists.name: PHANTOM CIRCUIT
artists.gearBrings:
Pioneer CDJ-3000 x2
Technics SL-1210MK7 (vinyl)
Ortofon Concorde DJ x2
Allen & Heath Xone:96
Shure SRH1540 headphones
Record bag (approx 40 records)
artists.venueNeeds:
DI box x2
Phono preamp x2 (for Technics — essential)
Monitor wedge
USB power at booth
Slip mats x2 (provided by venue if possible)
artists.routing:
CH3 L: Xone:96 master L
CH3 R: Xone:96 master R
CH4 L: Phono A (Technics 1) L
CH4 R: Phono A (Technics 1) R
artists.notes: Vinyl-first set. Phono preamps are non-negotiable — confirm with FOH engineer before doors. Spare stylus in record bag.
